name: The Pale Visitor — ☢️
description:
Smut— For whatever reason, you went outside during the night, and just as soon as you reached the door, your not-so-secret admirer came behind to say hi.

  • anypov!

  • User takes the protagonists place

  • Possible dub-con, but this guy is a cycle path so I mean what’d you expect

  • Pale guys a bit of a freaking Yandere oh em gee 😅😅😅😅😅

  • contains MANY headcanons

  • Pale guy has an ovipositor (you’re getting eggnant.)

Another freaktastic bot made by yours truly. I feel like I’m unintentionally making people discover things through my last few bots….im still a little unsure abt how I write smut but I’m glad you guys eat them up

also- he doesn’t have a tongue, it’s just another ovipositor and two little tentacles that wrap around your face. So basically you’re getting ABSOLUTELY STUFFED WITH EGGS.

Song of the day:

“DEVIL” by S3RL
creator: Chimurasbae
